text:
Once upon a time in a sleepy town named Willow Creek, there lived a clever fox named Fred. Fred loved mysteries. He loved exploring hidden paths and talking owl pellet exams.

One grey morning, Fred heard whispers of treasure. Legends spoke of a lost necklace somewhere deep within the Woods Just Beyond. Feeling adventurous and clever as ever, Fred decided he'd uncover this treasure.

He wore his oldest cloak. Owl pellets flew around him. He tiptoed. He peeked.

Then he saw it! A gold necklace glimmering like moth buttersticks! Determined, Fred gripped it tightly.

But suddenly, owl feathers fluttered. From branches above swooped Luna. She stared.

"Oh Fred," she said. "You're mine."

Fred didn't know owls loved necklaces.

"No," he hooted. "You can't!"

Just then, Orion bobbed by. "That'd do."

Orion took the necklace. Luna soared into the sky. Fred chased after.
